title: Non-admin user is blocked from accessing the admin area
description: This test verifies a non-admin user cannot access admin pages and is redirected or shown an access denied state.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin area from within the app navigation
Verify the user is blocked from viewing admin content by a redirect or an access denied state

title: Admin can approve a KYC application
description: This test verifies an admin can approve a pending KYC application and the application status updates to approved in the admin UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin area from within the app navigation
Open the KYC applications section
Wait for the KYC list to load
Open a pending KYC application
Approve the KYC application
Verify the KYC application status is shown as approved

title: Browse opportunities with category filter and trending sort
description: Verifies a visitor can browse opportunities, apply a category filter and trending sort, and see a list of matching projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /opportunities
Select a valid category filter
Select a trending sort option
Scroll to the results section
Verify a list of opportunities is displayed

title: Admin can view pending KYC applications list
description: This test verifies an admin can open the admin KYC section and see a list of KYC applications including pending items.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin area from within the app navigation
Open the KYC applications section
Wait for the KYC list to load
Verify KYC applications are displayed with their statuses

title: View an opportunity’s full details from the opportunities list
description: Verifies a visitor can open an opportunity from the list and view its key details including founder information and funding progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /opportunities
Click an opportunity from the list
Verify the opportunity details view is displayed
Verify founder information and funding progress are displayed

title: Admin can view users list with roles and KYC status
description: This test verifies an admin can open the admin users section and see user entries including role and KYC status fields.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin area from within the app navigation
Open the users management section
Wait for the users list to load
Verify users are displayed with role and KYC status information

title: Admin can change a user role
description: This test verifies an admin can change a user's role and the UI reflects the updated role on the user record.

steps.description: Navigate to the admin area from within the app navigation
Open the users management section
Wait for the users list to load
Open a user record from the list
Change the user's role to a different valid role
Save the role change
Verify the user record shows the updated role

title: Update profile details and preferences from settings
description: Verifies an authenticated user can update profile details and preferences from settings and sees the updated state reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open account settings
Fill in the full name field with Test User Updated
Adjust an investment preference setting
Save settings changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated profile name is shown in settings

title: Browse opportunities with default pagination behavior
description: Verifies the opportunities list can be extended by normal page interaction to view more results beyond the initial set.

steps.description: Navigate to /opportunities
Scroll to the bottom of the opportunities list
Wait for additional results to load
Verify more opportunities are displayed after scrolling

title: Mark notifications as read from the notifications center
description: This test verifies a logged-in user can view notifications and mark selected notifications as read and the UI reflects the updated read state.

steps.description: Navigate to the notifications page from within the app navigation
Wait for the notifications list to load
Select one unread notification
Mark the selected notification as read
Verify the selected notification is shown as read in the list

title: Discover opportunities by category from the discovery page
description: Verifies a visitor can use the discovery page to pick a category and see relevant opportunities.

steps.description: Navigate to /discover
Click a category to view matching opportunities
Verify a list of opportunities for the selected category is displayed

title: Deep-link from a notification to its related content
description: This test verifies clicking a notification navigates the user to the related in-app content page and the destination content is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the notifications page from within the app navigation
Wait for the notifications list to load
Click a notification item that supports navigation
Verify the user lands on the related content page and relevant content is displayed

title: Switch leaderboard between investors and projects
description: This test verifies a user can switch the leaderboard view between investors and projects and each view shows ranked results.

steps.description: Navigate to the leaderboard page
Select the investors leaderboard type
Wait for the investors rankings to load
Select the projects leaderboard type
Verify ranked entries are displayed for the selected leaderboard type

title: View KYC status from settings/profile area
description: Verifies an authenticated user can see their current KYC status displayed in the account settings or profile area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open account settings
Verify the user's KYC status is displayed

title: View trending projects from the trending page
description: Verifies a visitor can open the trending page and see a ranked or highlighted list of popular opportunities.

steps.description: Navigate to /trending
Verify trending opportunities are displayed

title: View notifications list as an authenticated user
description: This test verifies a logged-in user can open the notifications center and see a list or an empty state without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to the notifications page from within the app navigation
Wait for the notifications list to load
Verify notifications are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Mark all notifications as read
description: This test verifies a logged-in user can mark all notifications as read and the notifications center reflects no unread items.

steps.description: Navigate to the notifications page from within the app navigation
Wait for the notifications list to load
Mark all notifications as read
Verify there are no unread notifications indicated in the list

title: Change leaderboard period filter
description: This test verifies a user can change the leaderboard period and see the rankings update for the chosen time range.

steps.description: Navigate to the leaderboard page
Select a valid leaderboard type
Select a different valid period
Verify ranked entries are displayed for the chosen period

title: View another user's public profile without exposing private fields
description: Verifies navigating to a public profile page shows only public information and does not display private contact or restricted fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to a publicly accessible user profile page from within the app
Verify public profile information is displayed
Verify private or restricted profile fields are not displayed

title: View the leaderboard
description: Verifies a visitor can open the leaderboard page and see top projects and/or investors lists.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify leaderboard entries are displayed

title: Unread indicator updates after reading a notification
description: This test verifies that after opening a notification, unread indicators update consistently in the notifications center.

steps.description: Navigate to the notifications page from within the app navigation
Wait for the notifications list to load
Open an unread notification item
Return to the notifications list view
Verify the opened notification is no longer indicated as unread

title: Leaderboard loads with a default view
description: This test verifies the leaderboard page loads with a default type and period and displays ranked results or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to the leaderboard page
Wait for the leaderboard content to load
Verify ranked entries are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Toggle privacy preferences and verify they persist
description: Verifies a user can change privacy preferences in settings and the selected options persist after leaving and returning to settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open account settings
Toggle a privacy preference setting
Save settings changes
Click to navigate away to another in-app page
Click the link to open account settings
Verify the previously selected privacy preference is still enabled

title: Open leaderboard entry to view details
description: This test verifies a user can open a leaderboard entry and reach a relevant detail view or profile view for that entry.

steps.description: Navigate to the leaderboard page
Select a valid leaderboard type
Wait for ranked entries to load
Click a ranked entry
Verify a corresponding detail view or profile view is displayed

title: Enforce validation for invalid phone number format in settings
description: Verifies the settings form prevents saving when an invalid phone number is entered and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open account settings
Fill invalid text into the phone number field
Save settings changes
Verify a phone number validation error is visible
Verify the settings are not saved
